note: Sample Commander archetypes by play pattern. Edit freely.

archetypes.name: Voltron
archetypes.strategy: Suit up the commander with auras/equipment and win with commander damage.

archetypes.name: Tokens / Go-Wide
archetypes.strategy: Generate a wide board of tokens and overrun with anthems.

archetypes.name: Spellslinger
archetypes.strategy: Cast many instants/sorceries with magecraft and storm-like payoffs.

archetypes.name: Aristocrats
archetypes.strategy: Sacrifice creatures for value and drain opponents with death triggers.

archetypes.name: Ramp / Big Mana
archetypes.strategy: Accelerate mana to deploy oversized threats far ahead of curve.
